text: Excuse me sir. Sir question for you man. How old were you when you became a millionaire? Come here. I'm so proud of you. Thanks my man. What was your question? How old were you when you became a millionaire there? A millionaire? Yes sir. I was 21. And how did you get rich man? The people that don't know how did you make your million? Same thing you're doing right now brother. I was hustling I was making content. Let's talk about this so a lot of content creators are broke because they don't understand the business side of media. Talk to that young person out there. You built the billion dollar company. Yeah but James, but James that wasn't the goal bro. To be honest with you I just kind of ended up here. It feels like I clicked my heels together three times got a bit lucky. I love making content. I could tell you love making content. I've been following your page for years bro. That's what I'm saying. I'm proud of you. I'm proud of you. And I have a better offer than Jesse Itzler bro. 20 percent. 20 percent of your company bro. 25 mil. 25 mil bro. I guess I noted that bro. We may have to make that happen right? Got him. So maybe ask you this still. Yes sir. You don't get enough credit. You and your brother I would argue are two of the greatest marketers of all time. Thank you. What is your secret to marketing to anybody getting into business? So check this out bro. Attention's a currency. How you wield that attention. That's the art. I always say this. The opposite of hate is not love. It's indifference. What you cannot do is make people feel nothing. You got to make people feel. Now whether that's good or bad honestly doesn't really matter. People are fickle. They'll love you one second and then they'll hate you the next. But you never let it get to you. You made money regardless of what people thought about you. Brother I came to the very healthy realization that no stranger is going to tell me who I am. How long were you making content before you really started to take off and make money? That's the question bro. I started making videos at 9 years old. I'm getting goosebumps even just saying it's like we have put in the work. With content if you have this skill and you know how to captivate people with media this is the superpower right here. And how do you today? I'm 31. Do you believe in God? I do believe in God. Yeah I do. How did you know God was real? Two reasons. When I disrespected God I felt the wrath of God. And then when I respected God and accepted him and opened my heart and my life's been it's 180. 31 years old today. If me and you died tomorrow and you had one more message to leave with the younger generation what would that be? Do more. Life's not short you just gotta do more. I have a belt right here. I'm a tag team champion of the world actually. Fun fact. I'm a professional wrestler and I truly believe I was born to wrestle. It took me 27 years to find that talent. Try stuff and do more. You have amazing advice my friend. Yeah try it bro. Keep it up James. So good to see you bro. 20 percent.
